title: Hybrid physics–machine learning digital twin for industrial distillation columns
summary: A hybrid first-principles + neural ODE framework that reduces prediction error by 38% on a commercial distillation dataset.

title: Language-model-guided exploration of MOF synthesis space
summary: Using LLM agents to navigate combinatorial MOF synthesis literature and propose viable candidates for CO₂ capture.

title: Self-supervised anomaly detection in continuous chemical processes
summary: A contrastive learning approach to anomaly detection that doesn't require labeled fault data.
